content_en: Among what happens on this Day is weighing deeds, as Allah, Exalted be He, says: ~nd the weighing [of deeds] that Day will be the truth. So those whose scales are heavy - it is they who will be the successful. And those whose scales are light - they are the ones who will lose themselves for what injustice they were doing toward Our verses." (Quran: Al-A' raf: 8-9) And He also says: "And We place the scales ofjusticefor the Day ofResurrection, so no soul will be treated unjustly at all. And if there is [even] the weight ofa mustard seed, We will bring itforth. And sufficient are We as accountant:' (Quran: Al-Anbiya: 47) Thus, deeds will be weighed by real scales which have an indicator and two scale pans. Shaykhul-IsIAm Ibn Taymiyah (may Allah have mercy on him) said, "The Scale is the machine by which deeds will be weighed and it is different from justice, as indicated in the Noble Qurtin and the Sunnah (Prophetic Tradition). This is stated in the verse that reads, 'So those whose scales are heavy [with good deeds], ...' (Quran: Al-Qari' ah: 6) and the verse ~nd We place the scales ofjustice for the Day ofResurrection•.•' (Quran: Al-Qari' ah: 47)" Then, Ibn Taymiyah mentioned some b.adtths which deal with weighing deeds and said, "These b.adUhs prove that the deeds will be weighed by scales which will show whether the good deeds or the bad ones will outbalance. Thus, the scales are a means to state justice, for what is meant by weighing is to attain justice as in the scales ofthe worldly life. However, the nature of these scales is among what we are informed as beingfrom the Unseen ..." 4) Passing over the S.ir4! Among the happenings of the Day of Resurrection is passing over the Sird!., a bridge on the middle of the Hellfire, on which the first and later generations will pass. Each one will pass over it according to one's deeds. It is narrower than a hair, sharper than a sword and hotter than a firebrand. It has pincers which seize the one whom they have been commanded to seize. People pass over the Sirat according to their deeds in this world; some of them will pass over it like lightening, some like wind, some like a steed, some like a trotting man, some will walk., some will crawl, and some will be grabbed and cast down into the Hellfire. We ask Allah to grant us safety and protection. As-Safirioi said: "The majority ofscholars agree that the Sira!. is an established fact. But the people of truth verify it as being a real bridge which extends on the middle of Hellfire, and which is sharper than a sword and narrower than a hair. Judge 'Abdul-Jabbar 23, and many of his followers denied this claiming that the Sird!. in such a way cannot be crossed, and if it is crossed, this involves torment and there is no torment for the believers or the righteous people on the Day ofResurrection. Therefore, it may mean the path to Paradise that is indicated in Allah's saying, 'He will guide them and amend their condition' (Quran: Muhammad: 5) and the path to Hellfire as indicated in Allah's saying, ~ •.And guide them in the path ofHellfire: (Quran: A.~-SMfat: 23) Other scholars interpreted it as the clear evidence, allowed acts and evil deeds, for which one will be called to account. These are allegations offalsehood and superstitions. Crossing the Sirat is notas incredible as walkingon water, flying in the air or standing in it. Moreover, the Prophet (PBUH) answered the question about the disbeliever's gathering on his face on the Day ofResurrection saying that Allah's Power is capable ofdoing so."
content_id:
Di antara peristiwa yang terjadi pada Hari Itu adalah penimbangan amal, sebagaimana Allah berfirman: "Dan timbangan pada hari itu adalah kebenaran. Barangsiapa yang berat timbangannya, maka mereka itulah orang-orang yang beruntung. Dan barangsiapa yang ringan timbangannya, maka itulah orang-orang yang merugikan dirinya sendiri, disebabkan mereka selalu mengingkari ayat-ayat Kami." (Al-Araf: 8-9).

Ahlus Sunnah meyakini bahwa penimbangan amal adalah nyata dan fisik. Mizan (timbangan) adalah timbangan yang sesungguhnya di mana amal-amal manusia ditimbang. Yang ditimbang adalah amal-amal itu sendiri (dalam satu riwayat); dalam riwayat lain yang ditimbang adalah buku-buku catatan amal; dan dalam riwayat lainnya lagi yang ditimbang adalah pelakunya sendiri. Para ulama menggabungkan semua riwayat ini dengan mengatakan bahwa semuanya benar karena timbangan adalah besar dan luas.

Timbangan paling berat di antara semua amal adalah akhlak yang baik. Nabi ﷺ bersabda: "Tidak ada sesuatu yang lebih berat di atas timbangan pada Hari Kiamat daripada akhlak yang baik." Dua kalimat yang ringan di lisan namun berat di timbangan adalah: "Subhanallahi wa bihamdihi, Subhanallahil adhim."
content_ar:
يتناول هذا الجزء من كتاب "دليل العقيدة الصحيحة" موضوع: الميزان وأسراره. يُعنى الكتاب بتأسيس العقيدة الإسلامية على القواعد الأثرية المستقاة من القرآن الكريم والسنة النبوية المطهرة ومنهج السلف الصالح رضوان الله عليهم.

يُناقش المؤلف في هذا القسم مسائل عقدية دقيقة بأسلوب علمي موثّق، مُستشهداً بنصوص الوحي وأقوال علماء السلف وما أجمع عليه أهل السنة والجماعة في المسائل المحل بحث.

ومن أبرز منهجه: العناية بالردّ على الشبهات وإبطال مخالفات أهل البدع والأهواء، مع التمسك بمنهج الاعتدال في تقرير العقيدة دون غلو ولا تفريط، وصون الأمة من الزيادة والنقصان في دين الله.

هذا الكتاب في مجمله يُعدّ مرجعاً تأسيسياً لمن يريد فهم عقيدة أهل السنة والجماعة على الوجه الصحيح بعيداً عن الخلافات المذهبية والتشعبات الكلامية. وقد ثبت في السنة النبوية أن الميزان حق وأن فيه كفَّتين توضع فيهما الأعمال أو صحائفها، وأن أثقل شيء في الميزان كلمة لا إله إلا الله وهي مع خفَّتها في الميزان الدنيوي ثقيلة في ميزان الله.
